user.title: Medication Tracker
user.description: Give this tracker a name (e.g. My Medications, John's Medications).

abort.already_configured: A tracker with that name already exists.

data.name: Medication Name
data.instructions: Usage Instructions (e.g. Take 1 tablet twice daily with food)
data.refill_threshold: Refill Reminder — alert when quantity reaches this number (0 to disable)

data.confirm: I understand this cannot be undone

data.med_id: Select medication to add a schedule to

add_schedule_details.title: Add Dose Schedule
add_schedule_details.description: Set the days and time for this dose. Use the take_dose service in your automation at this time to deduct from quantity on hand.

data.dose_quantity: Dose amount (number of units to deduct per dose)
Dose amount (number of units to deduct per dose)

data.confirm: I understand this cannot be undone

error.days_required: At least one day must be selected.

abort.no_medications: No medications have been added yet.
abort.no_schedules: This medication has no schedules yet. Use Add a dose schedule first.

set_quantity.name: Set Quantity
set_quantity.description: Set a medication's quantity on hand to an exact value. Use after a manual stock count or to correct an entry. Fires a live update — no restart required.

item_id.name: Item ID
item_id.description: UUID of the medication to update. Found in the item_id attribute of the sensor entity.

quantity.name: Quantity
quantity.description: New quantity on hand. Must be 0 or greater.

take_dose.name: Take Dose
take_dose.description: Subtract a dose from a medication's quantity on hand. Quantity is floored at 0. Call this from a time-based automation at each scheduled dose time, or from a dashboard button. Fires a live update — no restart required.

item_id.name: Item ID
item_id.description: UUID of the medication to update. Found in the item_id attribute of the sensor entity.

dose_quantity.name: Dose Amount
dose_quantity.description: Number of units to deduct. Defaults to 1. Match this to the dose_quantity set on the schedule.

add_quantity.name: Add Quantity
add_quantity.description: Add quantity to a medication's current stock on hand. Use after picking up a prescription refill. Fires a live update — no restart required.

item_id.name: Item ID
item_id.description: UUID of the medication to update. Found in the item_id attribute of the sensor entity.

quantity.name: Quantity to Add
quantity.description: Number of units to add to current stock. Must be 0 or greater.
